'''Domo Jones''' was a young [[Human/Legends|Human]] [[Gender/Legends|male]] [[Nerf herder/Legends|nerf herder]] from [[Tatooine/Legends|Tatooine]] who successfully helped the [[Alliance to Restore the Republic/Legends|Alliance to Restore the Republic]] by sabotaging an [[Galactic Empire/Legends|Imperial]] purchase of [[Proton torpedo/Legends|proton torpedoes]].

To help with this, he enlisted the help of a [[Twi'lek/Legends|Twi'lek]] [[Waiter/Legends|waitress]] called [[JillJoo Jab]], a [[Protocol droid/Legends|protocol droid]] called [[UR-1]], and a [[Bith/Legends|Bith]] musician called [[Blerx Tango|Blerx]]. Domo and Jilljoo shared a kiss after they emerged victorious.

In [[1 ABY/Legends|1 ABY]], his herd of [[Nerf/Legends|nerfs]] was threatened by dangerous creatures. When Jones found the lair of the creatures, he hired a [[Spacer/Legends|spacer]] to destroy the creature lair and [[Death/Legends|kill]] the beasts, as he lacked the weapons and knowledge to kill them himself.<ref name="SWG:NH">{{SWGcite|exp=AED|type=terminal||Nerf Herder}} on Tatooine</ref>
